System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 782
Receive ID 7A2
Functional Addr 86
Functional Name AAU -Audio Amplifier Unit
